name: Averin Capital Acquisition Corp.
business: Averin Capital Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of the filing, it has not selected any business combination target. It intends to pursue a target at the intersection of technology and health.

exposures.sentence: Our acquisition and value creation strategy is to identify, acquire and, after our initial business combination, to build a company at the intersection of technology and health that complements the experience of our management team and that can benefit from our operational expertise.
The industry is being rewired by technology, with artificial intelligence and automation powering a new generation of transformative companies.
